name: American Family Fitness Mechanicsville
description: Come play pickleball at American Family Fitness Mechanicsville in Mechanicsville, VA! There is 1 indoor hard and acrylic court. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The court cannot be reserved. A membership is required to play. Players have access to lights, water, restrooms, locker rooms, and food.

name: Chickhomny middle school
description: Chickhomny middle school is a place to play pickleball in Mechanicsville, VA. There are 3 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Cool Spring Recreation Center
description: Cool Spring Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mechanicsville, VA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include lights.

name: Fairfield Presbyterian Church
description: Fairfield Presbyterian Church is a place to play pickleball in Mechanicsville, VA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Patrick Henry YMCA
description: Patrick Henry YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Ashland, VA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Pole Green Park
description: Pole Green Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mechanicsville, VA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Shady Grove United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Shady Grove United Methodist Church in Mechanicsville, VA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights, water, and restrooms. Reservations are available. The courts are private.
